examples: Recent medical studies confirm the efficacy of a healthier lifestyle.
Ciliv is selling the efficacy of so-called build-operate-transfer (BOT) operations.
Firms are now studying how genes interact, looking for correlations that might be used to determine the causes of disease or predict a drug's efficacy.
Vitamin manufacturers are to invited to submit evidence of the efficacy and safety of their high-dose products.
Practices like meditation, exercise, and cognitive therapy have shown comparable short-term efficacy to medication.
